form.formComment: At the latest run scored a big 5 len win at this track April 1 over 1200m defeating Yolkiran with 55.5kg at $2.65. Before that 5th of 9 at Sanliurfa on February 11 over 2000m, 31 len behind Hilvanlioglu carrying 57kg at $8. Sure to go well again.
